message:
Add eig_nxn for general (non-symmetric) eigenvalue decomposition

Implements numpy.linalg.eig equivalent for general real NxN matrices via
plain QR iteration converging to real Schur form. Eigenvalues are returned
as interleaved (re, im) pairs to support complex conjugate results from
non-symmetric matrices.

The algorithm:
1. Runs 500 iterations of QR decomposition (R*Q product)
2. Extracts eigenvalues from the quasi-upper-triangular result:
   - 1x1 diagonal blocks yield real eigenvalues
   - 2x2 blocks (detected by non-negligible sub-diagonal entry) yield
     complex conjugate pairs via the quadratic formula on the block's
     trace and determinant

Tests cover three key cases:
- Symmetric matrix (eigenvalues must be real, matching known values)
- Diagonal matrix (eigenvalues equal diagonal entries)
- 90-degree rotation matrix (eigenvalues are purely imaginary +/-i)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
